title: Instacart Product
description: Represents a product in the Instacart Catalog system. Products are defined at the retailer level and are the same across all of a retailer's stores. Store-specific attributes such as pricing and availability are managed through the Item entity.

product_code.description: The retailer's unique product identifier used to match the product in the Instacart system.

name.description: The display name of the product.

brand.description: The brand name of the product.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

size.description: The size or quantity description of the product, such as 12 oz or 6-pack.

upc.description: The Universal Product Code, typically 12 or 14 digits.

image_url.description: URL to the primary product image.

category.description: The product category in the retailer's taxonomy.

department.description: The store department the product belongs to.

attributes.description: Additional product attributes such as dietary information, certifications, or nutritional details.

items.description: Store-specific item records associated with this product.

Item.description: An item representing a product at a specific store location, containing store-specific attributes like pricing and availability.

product_code.description: The retailer's product identifier linking this item to its parent product.

store_code.description: The retailer's unique store identifier where this item is sold.

price.description: The current selling price of the item at this store.

sale_price.description: The promotional or sale price, if applicable.

sale_start_date.description: The start date of the sale period.

sale_end_date.description: The end date of the sale period.

available.description: Whether the item is currently available for purchase at this store.

inventory_count.description: The current inventory count at this store.

aisle.description: The store aisle where the item is located.

shelf.description: The shelf location within the aisle.
